title: salix × guinieri
intro: Salix × guinieri, also known as Guinier's willow, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Salix genus of willows. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Salix × guinieri include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
